title: Diagnose TerraYield frontend performance and lazy-load candidates
note: Non-destructive frontend performance diagnosis. Wait 3 minutes before writing devam et.
command:
Write-Output 'TASK: Frontend performans tanilama'; Write-Output 'PROGRESS: 20%'; Write-Output 'ESTIMATED_WAIT: 2-3 dakika'; Write-Output 'TIME:'; Get-Date; $run=Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $dir=Join-Path (Get-Location) ('.aays_next_fix/frontend_perf_diagnose_' + $run); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null; Write-Output ('REPORT_DIR=' + $dir); Write-Output '--- root files ---'; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name,Mode,Length | Out-String; Write-Output '--- frontend/package candidates ---'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include package.json,vite.config.js,vite.config.ts,next.config.js,tsconfig.json,tailwind.config.js,src,app | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Select-Object FullName,Length | Out-String; Write-Output '--- large frontend files top 60 ---'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.js,*.jsx,*.ts,*.tsx,*.css,*.html | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\dist\| uild\|\.aays_next_fix' } | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 60 FullName,Length | Out-String; Write-Output '--- api/fetch/axios/map candidates ---'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.js,*.jsx,*.ts,*.tsx | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\dist\| uild\|\.aays_next_fix' } | Select-String -Pattern 'fetch\(|axios|/map/listings|sales-history|external-evidence|parcels|combined|mapbox|leaflet|deck\.gl|useEffect|setInterval|addEventListener|debounce|throttle|React.lazy|lazy\(' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 220 | ForEach-Object { $_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ': ' + $_.Line }; Write-Output '--- package scripts ---'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter package.json | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output ('PACKAGE=' + $_.FullName); Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw | Select-Object -First 1 }; Write-Output '--- current api quick size check ---'; foreach ($ep in @('/map/listings','/map/sales-history/external-evidence','/map/sales-history/combined')) { try { $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('http://localhost:8010' + $ep) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 45; $sw.Stop(); Write-Output ('API ' + $ep + ' status=' + $r.StatusCode + ' ms=' + $sw.ElapsedMilliseconds + ' bytes=' + $r.Content.Length) } catch { Write-Output ('API_FAIL ' + $ep + ' error=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output 'FRONTEND_PERF_DIAGNOSE_DONE'
